name: French & Francophone Studies
note: A grade of C (2.0) or higher must be earned in all courses counted toward the major. One credit from a course taught in French must be taken in the senior year.

sections.label: 300-400 Level French Courses
sections.description: Eight course credits of 300- to 400-level courses in French. FRE-315 is required. Up to three credits may be earned by study abroad in France or a francophone country approved by the College and department. Up to one credit may be from the approved courses taught in English.
